ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., in-person, online, self-paced) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of course IDs that are prerequisites for this course */,
  "co_requisites" TEXT /* JSON array of course IDs that are co-requisites for this course */,
  "bundles" TEXT /* JSON array of course IDs that are part of a bundle */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A metric to track the overall engagement of the course */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A metric to track the popularity of the course */,
  "organization_unit" TEXT /* The organizational unit that the course belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* The physical or virtual location of the session */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A metric to track the engagement of the session */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* JSON array of participant IDs who attended the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the instructor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* JSON array of expertise areas */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the instructor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_instructors" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the instructor in the session (e.g., primary, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the participant */,
  "interests" TEXT /* JSON array of interests */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_participants" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date the participant enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the participant in the course (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* The attendance status of the participant in the session (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., video, document, link) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* The date and time the material was uploaded */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the material has been accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the material record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the material record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "max_score" TEXT /* The maximum score for the assignment */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* The average score of all submissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the evaluation belongs to */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the evaluation */,
  "max_score" TEXT /* The maximum score for the evaluation */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* The average score of all evaluations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
